name: Kreussler Inc.

overview.summary: Kreussler is a fourth-generation, family-owned German chemical manufacturer that pioneered both professional wet cleaning (Lanadol system, developed with Miele) and the first bio-based dry cleaning solvent (SolvonK4). Known for the SYSTEMK4 halogen-free cleaning system, the PRENETT color-coded spotting line, and the DEPRIT Professional six-product spotting kit. Kreussler is the innovation leader in professional textile care chemistry, operating in 70+ countries.
overview.historyAndReputation: Founded in 1912 by Christian Kreussler in Wiesbaden, Germany, as a textile dye manufacturer. Expanded into textile care chemistry and pharmaceuticals. Won the State of Hessen Innovation Award in 1993 for wet cleaning development with Miele. Four generations of the Travers-Kreussler family have maintained a reputation for premium quality, scientific rigor, and environmental leadership. Their US subsidiary has operated from Tampa, FL since 1990.
overview.marketPosition: Premium tier. Kreussler is the choice for high-end cleaners who process delicate garments — silk, cashmere, couture, wedding gowns, museum textiles. Their SYSTEMK4 is the most advanced non-perc dry cleaning system available. Market share in the US is smaller than R.R. Street or A.L. Wilson due to premium pricing, but among quality-focused operators, Kreussler is the standard.

specialties: Professional wet cleaning (Lanadol system with Miele)
Color-coded spotting agents (PRENETT ABC, DEPRIT Professional)
Delicate fabric chemistry (silk, wool, cashmere, fur, leather)
Solvent maintenance and machine care products

productLines.categoryDescription: The primary cleaning medium. Kreussler's SolvonK4 is the only bio-based dry cleaning solvent on the market — an acetal compound derived from corn. It represents Kreussler's vision for the future of dry cleaning: effective, non-toxic, biodegradable.

products.name: SolvonK4
products.description: Halogen-free, acetal-based solvent with purity above 99%. Derived from corn-based carbon, manufactured in the US. Non-toxic, biodegradable, dermatologically tested 'Very Good.' Not classified as hazardous. Patent-protected. Cleaning performance equals or exceeds perchloroethylene in independent testing. Dissolves both lipophilic (oil) and hydrophilic (water) soils, giving it broader cleaning action than perc alone.
usedFor: primary dry cleaning solvent in SYSTEMK4 machines
fibers: all fibers including silk, wool, cashmere, leather
notFor: requires SYSTEMK4-compatible equipment — cannot be used in standard perc or hydrocarbon machines
products.proTips: SolvonK4 cleans both oil-based and water-based soils due to its amphiphilic chemistry — this dual action reduces pre-spotting needs. Garments come out with a noticeably soft hand compared to perc or hydrocarbon cleaning.
products.availability: through Kreussler Inc. (Tampa) and authorized distributors

productLines.categoryDescription: Injection/charge detergents added to the solvent to enhance cleaning. Kreussler's CLIP family is compatible with virtually every solvent system — perc, hydrocarbon, D5, liquid CO2, and SolvonK4.

products.name: CLIPK4
products.description: Concentrated dry cleaning detergent designed specifically for the SYSTEMK4/SolvonK4 system. Provides anti-static properties, hygienic freshness, prevents greying, and improves wear comfort. Optimized for SolvonK4's unique chemistry.
notFor: designed for SolvonK4 — use CLIP COMBI for other solvents
products.proTips: CLIPK4 is specifically tuned for SolvonK4's acetal chemistry. Don't substitute CLIP COMBI in a SYSTEMK4 machine — the detergent-solvent interaction is optimized.
products.alternativeTo: Other SYSTEMK4-specific detergents (none exist — Kreussler is the sole supplier)
products.availability: through Kreussler Inc. and authorized distributors

products.name: CLIP COMBI
products.description: Concentrated, antistatic, fragranced detergent compatible with all major solvent systems: perc, hydrocarbon, cyclosiloxane D5, and liquid CO2. The most popular product in Kreussler's CLIP range. Delivers premium cleaning results across solvent types.
products.proTips: CLIP COMBI is the 'one detergent for any machine' solution. If a shop runs multiple solvent systems or is transitioning between solvents, CLIP COMBI works in all of them.
products.availability: through Kreussler Inc. and authorized distributors

products.name: CLIP GREEN CONC
products.description: Super-concentrated version of the CLIP detergent line. Delivers premium results at half to one-quarter the dosage of competitor detergents. Cost-effective despite premium pricing per unit because of the extreme concentration factor.
products.proTips: The concentration means precise dosing matters more. Use Kreussler's recommended dosing charts. Over-dosing wastes product; under-dosing leaves soil.
products.availability: through Kreussler Inc. and authorized distributors

productLines.categoryDescription: Color-coded pre-spotting agents organized by stain chemistry. Applied before machine cleaning. The color system makes identification instant: Blue = tannin (acidic), Red = protein (alkaline), Green = fat/makeup (neutral). Compatible with all solvent systems.

products.name: PRENETT A (Blue)
products.description: Acidic pre-spotter (pH 3.0-4.0) for tannin-based stains. Removes coffee, tea, wine, fruit juice, grass, and other plant-polyphenol stains. Blue color coding for instant identification on the spotting board.
fibers: most fabrics — test on delicates due to acidic pH
products.proTips: The pH 3.0-4.0 range is aggressive enough for most tannin stains but requires quick flushing on silk and acetate. The color coding eliminates bottle mix-ups during fast-paced board work.
products.alternativeTo: R.R. Street StreeTAN®, A.L. Wilson BonGo®
products.availability: through Kreussler Inc. and authorized distributors

products.name: PRENETT B (Red)
products.description: Alkaline pre-spotter (pH 9.5-10.5) for protein-based stains. Removes blood, milk, food residue, perspiration, and other protein stains. Red color coding.
fibers: most fabrics — alkaline pH requires caution on wool and silk
notFor: wool (risk of fiber damage at pH >8)
products.proTips: pH 9.5-10.5 is effective on proteins but pushes into the danger zone for protein fibers (silk, wool). For protein stains on silk or wool, use SOFSPOT® or a neutral approach instead. Always flush quickly.
products.alternativeTo: R.R. Street StreePRO®, A.L. Wilson QwikGo®
products.availability: through Kreussler Inc. and authorized distributors

products.name: PRENETT C (Green)
products.description: Neutral pH pre-spotter for fat-bound and makeup stains. Pre-brush application with 10-20 minute dwell time before solvent cleaning. Green color coding.
fibers: all — neutral pH is safe for delicates
products.proTips: The 10-20 minute dwell time is important — PRENETT C works by slowly emulsifying fats. Don't rush it. Apply, hang the garment, and come back to it. The neutral pH means it's safe on everything including silk and acetate.
products.availability: through Kreussler Inc. and authorized distributors

productLines.categoryDescription: Six-product professional post-spotting kit for stains that survive machine cleaning. Color-coded by function. Water-soluble, biodegradable, halogen-free, drain-safe. Products 1-3 handle 80-90% of residual stains; products 4-6 are specialty tools.

products.name: DEPRIT RED (1)
products.description: Alkaline post-spotter for blood, albumin, protein, food residues, and pigment stains that survived machine cleaning. The first agent to reach for when a protein stain persists after cleaning.
fibers: standard fabrics — caution on protein fibers
products.proTips: Apply undiluted, 15-30 second dwell, steam or gentle brush. DEPRIT RED handles most post-cleaning protein residue. If it doesn't resolve, escalate to DEPRIT YELLOW for old/set protein stains.
products.availability: through Kreussler Inc. and authorized distributors

products.name: DEPRIT GREEN (2)
products.description: Neutral post-spotter for paint, oil, grease, wax, makeup, ink, and adhesive stains. The dry-side post-spotting agent in the DEPRIT system.
products.proTips: DEPRIT GREEN is the POG equivalent in the DEPRIT system. Neutral pH makes it safe for everything. The #2 product you'll use most often after DEPRIT RED.
products.availability: through Kreussler Inc. and authorized distributors

products.name: DEPRIT BLUE (3)
products.description: Acidic post-spotter for tannin, fruit, juice, wine, coffee, tea, cola, and drug stains that survived machine cleaning.
fibers: standard fabrics — flush quickly on delicates
products.proTips: If PRENETT A didn't fully resolve a tannin stain during pre-spotting, DEPRIT BLUE is the post-cleaning follow-up. Same chemistry, more concentrated application.
products.availability: through Kreussler Inc. and authorized distributors

products.name: DEPRIT WHITE (4)
products.description: Surfactant-free solvent blend for grease, oil, adhesive, bubble gum, and wax. The specialty dry-side agent when DEPRIT GREEN's surfactant-based approach isn't enough for stubborn non-polar soils.
products.proTips: DEPRIT WHITE is the escalation from DEPRIT GREEN. If GREEN didn't dissolve a stubborn adhesive or wax, WHITE's pure solvent approach usually will.
products.availability: through Kreussler Inc. and authorized distributors

products.name: DEPRIT YELLOW (5)
products.description: Acidic post-spotter for rust, metal stains, old blood, and ointment stains. Contains chemistry specifically targeted at iron oxide (rust) and metallic deposits.
products.proTips: DEPRIT YELLOW is the only rust-specific product in the Kreussler spotting lineup. Old blood that has oxidized (turned brown) responds better to YELLOW than to RED because the iron in hemoglobin has bonded like rust.
products.availability: through Kreussler Inc. and authorized distributors

products.name: DEPRIT PURPLE (6)
products.description: Alkaline post-spotter for ink, color pigments, and color transfer stains. The specialty agent for dye-based stains that other agents can't touch.
fibers: colorfast fabrics only — test dyes first
products.proTips: DEPRIT PURPLE attacks dye-based stains, which means it can also attack garment dyes. Always test in a hidden area first. This is a powerful specialty agent — not for everyday use.
products.availability: through Kreussler Inc. and authorized distributors

productLines.categoryDescription: Kreussler's Lanadol system, developed over 20 years ago in partnership with Miele, is the industry standard for professional wet cleaning. Blue Angel certified. Designed to safely wash garments labeled 'dry clean only' in water using controlled chemistry, temperature, and mechanical action.

products.name: LANADOL AKTIV
products.description: Primary wet cleaning detergent with mild surfactants and fiber/color protection chemistry. The foundation of the Lanadol system. Ideal for wool, silk, and delicate fabrics that would normally require dry cleaning.
products.proTips: LANADOL AKTIV's mild surfactants are specifically chosen to not strip natural lanolin from wool or damage silk's peptide bonds. The difference between this and regular detergent on a cashmere sweater is the difference between perfect results and a felted disaster.
products.availability: through Kreussler Inc. and authorized distributors

products.name: LANADOL AVANT
products.description: Pre-brushing agent with cold-active enzymes and fat-optimized surfactants. Targets collar marks, heavy soil, and extreme dirt before the wet cleaning cycle. The enzymatic component works at low temperatures — no need for hot water.
products.proTips: LANADOL AVANT contains enzymes — this means it CANNOT be used on silk or wool. Enzymes digest protein, and silk/wool ARE protein. Use only on non-protein fibers for pre-spotting.
products.availability: through Kreussler Inc. and authorized distributors

products.name: LANADOL APRET
products.description: Sizing and finishing agent applied after wet cleaning. Protects fibers during drying, facilitates finishing/pressing, and provides pleasant hand/feel to the finished garment.
products.proTips: APRET is critical for professional results in wet cleaning. Without it, garments dry limp and are harder to press. With it, they finish with the crisp, smooth hand customers expect from dry cleaning.
products.availability: through Kreussler Inc. and authorized distributors

products.name: LANADOL LICKER
products.description: Specialty finishing agent for leather and fur garments after wet cleaning. Restores suppleness, enriches color depth, and prevents the stiffness that water cleaning can cause in leather.
products.proTips: Leather and fur lose their natural oils during any cleaning process. LICKER replaces those oils and restores the hand. Without it, cleaned leather comes back stiff and dry.
products.availability: through Kreussler Inc. and authorized distributors

productLines.categoryDescription: Products that maintain solvent purity, prevent corrosion, and extend machine life. Critical for keeping cleaning results consistent and protecting equipment investment.

products.name: PERAMON
products.description: Weekly maintenance product that binds acid buildup in solvent, inhibits bacterial growth, reduces odor, and prevents corrosion. Compatible with perc, hydrocarbon, siloxane, and SolvonK4.
products.proTips: Neglecting PERAMON leads to acidic solvent that damages garments and corrodes machine components. Weekly dosing is non-negotiable for consistent results.
products.availability: through Kreussler Inc. and authorized distributors

productLines.categoryDescription: Post-cleaning treatments that add water/stain repellency, stabilize dyes, or protect finished garments.

products.name: HYDROB EASY DRY
products.description: PFOA/PFOS-free water and oil repellent treatment. Low drying temperature requirement. For sportswear, rainwear, protective clothing, and stain-resistant finishing. Modern fluorocarbon-free chemistry.
fibers: most fabrics suitable for repellent treatment
products.proTips: PFOA/PFOS-free is increasingly important for regulatory compliance and customer demand. HYDROB EASY DRY is the modern answer to older fluorocarbon-based repellents.
products.availability: through Kreussler Inc. and authorized distributors

products.name: VINOYK4
products.description: Water and stain repellent that also preserves solvent pureness in the SYSTEMK4 system. Dual function: protects garments and protects the solvent.
products.proTips: VINOYK4 is unique in that it both treats garments AND maintains solvent quality — reducing the frequency of distillation needed.
products.availability: through Kreussler Inc. and authorized distributors

agentMapping.NSD: CLIP COMBI (universal detergent), CLIPK4 (SYSTEMK4-specific), CLIP GREEN CONC (super-concentrate)
agentMapping.POG: PRENETT C (Green — neutral pre-spotter for fats/makeup), DEPRIT GREEN (post-spotter), DEPRIT WHITE (solvent blend for stubborn non-polar soils)
agentMapping.protein: PRENETT B (Red — alkaline pre-spotter, pH 9.5-10.5), DEPRIT RED (alkaline post-spotter)
agentMapping.tannin: PRENETT A (Blue — acidic pre-spotter, pH 3.0-4.0), DEPRIT BLUE (acidic post-spotter)
agentMapping.leveling: COLOFIX (fixing and leveling agent for dye stabilization)
agentMapping.rustRemover: DEPRIT YELLOW (acidic post-spotter for rust, metal stains, old blood)
agentMapping.enzymatic: LANADOL AVANT (cold-active enzymes for pre-brushing — NOT for silk/wool)
agentMapping.solvent: SolvonK4 (bio-based acetal), plus compatibility with perc, hydrocarbon, D5, liquid CO2

fiberExpertise.silk: Kreussler's strongest fiber. SYSTEMK4/SolvonK4 is the industry gold standard for silk cleaning — the amphiphilic solvent cleans effectively without the harshness of perc. PRENETT C (neutral pH) is safe for silk pre-spotting. LANADOL AKTIV for wet cleaning silk. NEVER use PRENETT B (alkaline) or LANADOL AVANT (enzymes) on silk.
fiberExpertise.wool: LANADOL AKTIV is specifically designed for wool wet cleaning — mild surfactants preserve lanolin. SYSTEMK4 for dry cleaning wool. Avoid PRENETT B (alkaline) for extended contact. LANADOL APRET for finishing.
fiberExpertise.leather: LANADOL LICKER is a dedicated leather/fur finishing agent that restores suppleness and color depth after cleaning. Kreussler has specific protocols for leather cleaning in both SYSTEMK4 and Lanadol systems.
fiberExpertise.synthetics: Full product line compatible. CLIP COMBI handles synthetic garments in any solvent system. No special considerations needed.
fiberExpertise.delicates: Kreussler is THE delicate fabric specialist. The entire SYSTEMK4 system is built around the premise that cleaning should be gentle enough for the most delicate garments. PRENETT C (neutral) for pre-spotting delicates, LANADOL AKTIV for wet cleaning, COLOFIX for dye protection.

protocols.name: PRENETT ABC Color-Coded Spotting
protocols.description: Three-product pre-spotting system: identify the stain type, grab the matching color bottle. Blue (PRENETT A) for tannin/beverage stains, Red (PRENETT B) for protein/food stains, Green (PRENETT C) for fat/makeup stains. Apply, dwell 10-20 minutes (C) or brief contact (A, B), then load for machine cleaning. The color coding eliminates the guesswork and speeds up board work.
protocols.usedFor: Pre-spotting all common stain types before machine cleaning

protocols.name: DEPRIT Professional Six-Step Post-Spotting
protocols.description: After machine cleaning, address residual stains with the appropriate DEPRIT product: RED (1) for protein/food, GREEN (2) for oil/grease, BLUE (3) for tannin/beverage, WHITE (4) for stubborn non-polar (gum, wax), YELLOW (5) for rust/metal, PURPLE (6) for ink/dye transfer. Apply undiluted, 15-30 second dwell, steam or gentle brush. Products 1-3 handle 80-90% of residual stains.
protocols.usedFor: Post-cleaning residual stain removal — the final quality check before pressing

protocols.name: Lanadol Wet Cleaning System
protocols.description: Complete wet cleaning workflow: pre-spot with LANADOL AVANT (non-protein fibers only), wash with LANADOL AKTIV in Miele or compatible wet cleaning machine at controlled temperature and mechanical action, apply LANADOL APRET sizing before drying, controlled drying, finish. For leather/fur, add LANADOL LICKER before drying.
protocols.usedFor: Professional wet cleaning of dry-clean-only garments including wool, silk, cashmere, leather, and fur

distributionNetwork.distributionMethod: both direct and through authorized distributors
distributionNetwork.howToBuy: Contact Kreussler Inc. at 1-866-860-9265 (Tampa, FL) for direct purchase or nearest distributor. SYSTEMK4 equipment requires consultation and installation support from Kreussler. Individual spotting products available through dry cleaning supply distributors.

strengthsKnownFor: Only bio-based dry cleaning solvent on the market (SolvonK4)
Industry-standard wet cleaning system (Lanadol with Miele — 20+ years proven)
Best-in-class delicate fabric handling (silk, cashmere, couture)
Color-coded spotting systems (PRENETT ABC, DEPRIT Professional) — intuitive and fast
DLI partnership — donated SYSTEMK4 machine for training curriculum
limitations: Premium pricing — significantly more expensive than Street's or A.L. Wilson
Smaller US market share — most shops use less expensive alternatives
Smaller US team (26 employees) limits on-site support capacity compared to larger competitors
Some products (PRENETT B, LANADOL AVANT) have fiber restrictions that require knowledge to navigate safely
industryReputation.whoUsesThem: High-end dry cleaners processing couture, wedding gowns, silk, cashmere, and leather. Shops that market 'eco-friendly' or 'green' cleaning. Operations that have invested in SYSTEMK4 equipment. Cleaners who handle museum textiles, archival garments, or irreplaceable items. The typical Kreussler customer is a quality-focused operator willing to pay premium pricing for premium results.

education.trainingResources: Kreussler donated a SYSTEMK4 machine to DLI (Drycleaning & Laundry Institute) for inclusion in their training curriculum. They offer scholarship partnerships with DLI. In-house training facility in Germany.
education.technicalSupport: Field technicians available for SYSTEMK4 equipment commissioning and ongoing training. Staff average 25 years of industry experience. Phone support through Tampa office at 1-866-860-9265.
education.publications: Product-specific technical documentation. Spotting guides for PRENETT and DEPRIT systems. SolvonK4 technical data and safety information published on kreusslerinc.com.

gonrIntegration.relevance: Kreussler represents the premium end of professional textile care chemistry. When GONR protocols address delicate fibers (silk, cashmere, wool) or specify professional-only treatment, Kreussler products are the safest and most effective option. Their color-coded spotting systems align naturally with GONR's structured protocol approach.
gonrIntegration.agentCrossReference: When a GONR protocol calls for: protein spotter → PRENETT B (Red) or DEPRIT RED; tannin spotter → PRENETT A (Blue) or DEPRIT BLUE; POG/dry-side spotter → PRENETT C (Green) or DEPRIT GREEN/WHITE; rust remover → DEPRIT YELLOW; ink remover → DEPRIT PURPLE; wet cleaning detergent → LANADOL AKTIV; enzyme pre-spotter → LANADOL AVANT (NOT on silk/wool); leveling agent → COLOFIX; delicate fabric spotter → PRENETT C (neutral pH, safe for silk/wool).
gonrIntegration.whenToRecommend: Recommend Kreussler when: the garment is high-value or irreplaceable (couture, wedding gown, vintage); the fiber is silk, cashmere, or fine wool; the shop markets eco-friendly cleaning; the protocol requires maximum safety with minimum risk; the cleaner has invested in SYSTEMK4 equipment; or when professional wet cleaning is the recommended approach.
